document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

provisions.text: R-3A ZONE REQUIREMENTS Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 20 feet (6.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 8 feet (2.4 m) Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m)

requirement_sections.title_label_raw: Notwithstanding Section 4.9, the existing mobile home park shall be permitted to the

provisions.text: Notwithstanding Section 4.9, the existing mobile home park shall be permitted to the extent it is in existence at the time the land use by -law is adopted. Any expansion shall be subject to Section 3.6 of this By-law (Uses Considered by Development Agreement).

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any R-3A (Mobile Home Park) Zone except for

Minimum Front or Flankage Yard 20 feet (6.1 m) Minimum Rear or Side Yard 8 feet (2.4 m) Maximum Height of Main Building 35 feet (10.7 m) 10.3 Notwithstanding Section 4.9, the existing mobile home park shall be permitted to the extent it is in existence at the time the land use by -law is adopted. Any expansion shall be subject to Section 3.6 of this By-law (Uses Considered by Development Agreement).

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
